query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(fieldManager) as with_manager, COUNT(DISTINCT fieldManager) as unique_managers, COUNT(DISTINCT buildingId) as unique_buildings FROM customers WHERE buildingId IS NOT NULL;
